productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Striped Grey Trousers
description: Composition Black striped formal trousers, made of polyester and viscose blend, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered beside right pocket on the front, two buttoned welt pockets on the back, metal zipper and hook closure and has extendable hems Fit Regular fit; Regular rise Wash care Machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron These formal trousers from mark taylor will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest of fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best without effort. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
